productDisplayName: Nike Women City Court White Sports Shoe
description: Superior grip in an ultra-lightweight package, the City Court VI tennis shoe from nike comes with ample cushioning and support to help you make those winning aces. Team this with tennis performance clothes when hitting the court, or simply pair them with jeans and t-shirts for that casual look. Upper Wide midfoot leather straps with a padded fabric inner lining for sweat-free and abrasion-free comfort Suede lined padded footbed ergonomically raised to offer a massage feel Outsole TPR outsole with startegically placed textured waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves for ease of movement Curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort Sandal care Wipe away dust with a clean and dry cloth Use a branded leather conditioner when needed Dust the footbed using a suede brush Do not store in direct sunlight
